summary: A Fox News 'Exclusive' split-screen interview of Acting U.S. Attorney General Todd Blanche by Maria Bartiromo about claims of a rigged 2020 election and ongoing investigations in Arizona and Georgia. Frames show the standard two-box news layout with a 'LIVE' bug and lower-third chyrons ('EXAMINING ELECTION SECURITY AHEAD OF THE MIDTERMS', 'SAVE AMERICA ACT STALLED IN GOP-LED SENATE'). It is a televised news interview, not a music-driven or stylized produced spectacle; the 'save-america' tag is a chyron, not a produced slogan.
notable_text: On-screen chyrons: 'EXCLUSIVE', 'EXAMINING ELECTION SECURITY AHEAD OF THE MIDTERMS', 'TRUMP CALLS ON SENATE GOP TO PASS VOTER ID BILL', 'SAVE AMERICA ACT STALLED IN GOP-LED SENATE', 'TODD BLANCHE | ACTING U.S. ATTORNEY GENERAL'.
